source: Patterns adapted from ExPASy PeptideCutter (https://web.expasy.org/peptide_cutter/) — same upstream as pyteomics.parser.expasy_rules. Curated for Constellation.

proteases.name: Trypsin
proteases.description: Cleaves C-terminal to K or R, not before P. Default proteomics workhorse.

proteases.name: Trypsin (no proline rule)
proteases.description: Cleaves C-terminal to K or R, including before P. Common in some search-engine defaults.

proteases.name: Lys-C
proteases.description: Cleaves C-terminal to K, not before P. Endoproteinase Lys-C.

proteases.name: Lys-C (no proline rule)
proteases.description: Cleaves C-terminal to K, including before P.

proteases.name: Lys-N
proteases.description: Cleaves N-terminal to K. Metalloendopeptidase from Grifola frondosa.

proteases.name: Arg-C
proteases.description: Cleaves C-terminal to R, not before P. Clostripain.

proteases.name: Chymotrypsin (high specificity)
proteases.description: Cleaves C-terminal to F|W|Y, not before P.

proteases.name: Chymotrypsin (low specificity)
proteases.description: Cleaves C-terminal to F|W|Y|L|M, not before P. Reflects observed cleavage at extended specificity.

proteases.name: Asp-N
proteases.description: Cleaves N-terminal to D. Endoproteinase Asp-N.

proteases.name: Asp-N + Glu
proteases.description: Cleaves N-terminal to D or E (occurs with some Asp-N preparations).

proteases.name: Glu-C (V8 phosphate buffer)
proteases.description: Cleaves C-terminal to E, not before P. Staphylococcal V8 in phosphate buffer.

proteases.name: Glu-C (V8 bicarbonate buffer)
proteases.description: Cleaves C-terminal to D or E, not before P. Staphylococcal V8 in bicarbonate buffer.

proteases.name: Pepsin (pH 1.3)
proteases.description: Cleaves C-terminal to F or L, not before P. Pepsin at low pH (~1.3).

proteases.name: Pepsin (pH > 2)
proteases.description: Cleaves C-terminal to F|L|W|Y, not before P. Pepsin at higher pH (>2).

proteases.name: Proteinase K
proteases.description: Broad serine protease; cleaves C-terminal to A|F|I|L|V|W|Y. Useful for surface-shaving and HDX.

proteases.name: Thermolysin
proteases.description: Cleaves N-terminal to A|F|I|L|M|V; not after D|E. Heat-stable metalloprotease from Bacillus thermoproteolyticus.

proteases.name: No enzyme
proteases.description: Never matches; cleave() returns the whole protein unchanged. Useful for searches that consider arbitrary peptide spans.
